reasoning: All models skipped the only critical file (PKGBUILD) due to incorrect binary detection, preventing any security assessment.
coverage_issues: PKGBUILD was universally skipped despite being essential for build/install analysis
No files were reviewed - critical build/install hooks couldn't be assessed
false_negatives: All potential risks in PKGBUILD (network access, filesystem operations, malicious commands) were missed due to skipped review
learnings: Fix binary detection heuristics to never skip PKGBUILD files
Implement fallback text decoding for misidentified scripts
Prioritize PKGBUILD/.install files above all others in initial scan
Add validation step to abort audit if critical files are skipped
Improve error handling for file reading failures
